category_sources: source_facts.description says Hypothesis testing using Phylogenies; official hyphy.org homepage calls HyPhy open-source software for comparative sequence analysis using stochastic evolutionary models.
display_name_sources: Official hyphy.org homepage branding is HyPhy; source_facts.name is hyphy.
docs_sources: Official hyphy.org navigation links Getting Started, Methods, CLI Tutorial, and Batch Language reference/library pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/veg/hyphy; per instruction, repo returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository topics include science, bioinformatics, evolution, statistical-methods, phylogenetics, comparative-genomics; source_facts.description identifies hypothesis testing using phylogenies.
